creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
linimon@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Old Synopsis: Akonadiserver core dumped
> New Synopsis: databases/akonadi: akonadiserver core dumped
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->kde
> Responsible-Changed-By: linimon
> Responsible-Changed-When: Thu Jul 21 02:51:19 UTC 2011
> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> Fix synopsis and assign.

Thanks for the report. The backtrace, however, is not of much use, as
you have not compiled the ports with debugging symbols. Furthermore,
these crashes should be reported directly upstream, via
https://bugs.kde.org.

Please recompile akonadi (and possibly qt4-corelib) with WITH_DEBUG=1
and post a new backtrace to KDE's bugtracker.
